description_long: This object is a standard skateboard featuring a flat, elongated wooden deck with rounded ends and a black grip tape surface on top. The deck is supported by two metal trucks, each mounted with a pair of small, red polyurethane wheels. The wheels are classic street style, suitable for urban environments like sidewalks and skate parks. The underside of the deck appears plain, with no visible graphics or branding. The overall construction suggests durability and functionality for performing tricks or cruising on smooth surfaces.
description: A classic skateboard with a black grip tape deck, red street wheels, and metal trucks, designed for urban use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the skateboard, black deck, and red wheels beneath.
description_view_1: End-on view highlighting the rounded nose of the black deck and the width of the board.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, showing the skateboard's length and wheel placement.
description_view_3: End-on view from the tail, showing the rounded end and the board's width.
attribute_wheel_type: street, small, red, no visible text or logos
attribute_truck_style: standard, silver color, no visible branding, top-mounted
attribute_grip_tape_pattern: solid black, no visible pattern or graphics
